---
title: "flow"
subtitle: "A Touying theme from Typst Universe"
format:
  touying-typst:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        #import "@preview/touying-flow:1.2.0": *
        // flow's default code font is the uninstalled "Jetbrains Mono NL"; point
        // it at the JetBrains Mono we fetch via `brand` so the build is clean.
        #let flow-theme = flow-theme.with(code-font: "JetBrains Mono")
    theme-typst: flow-theme
author:
  - name: Your Name
    affiliations: Your Institution
date: today
date-format: long
brand:
  typography:
    monospace: JetBrains Mono
    fonts:
      - family: JetBrains Mono
        source: google
---

{{< include _slides.qmd >}}
